---
title: "ECON 470 Peer Review"
subtitle: "Submission Spring 2026"
author: "Srijon Sarkar"
format:
  pdf:
    output-file: "sarkar-s-review"
    output-ext:  "pdf"
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{float}
      - \floatplacement{table}{H}
---

```{r}
#| include: false

# Preliminaries -----------------------------------------------------------
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, lubridate, haven)

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

hcris.full <- read_tsv("../data/output/HCRIS_Data.txt")
```

## Question 1
